raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to review the section centrally includes checking whether the argument from tooling redundancy to routing contribution is coherent.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about dataset size, recall, cost, and false positives that should be checked against the reported experimental basis.","R1.4":"The claim that ANALYZE-ROUTE is the first per-commit routing benchmark makes novelty assessment a central review responsibility.","R1.5":"Reviewing a section includes assessing whether the background, gap, method preview, and contribution claim are ordered effectively.","R1.6":"A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.","R1.7":"The discussion of existing analyzers and recent related work makes literature coverage, attribution, and reference accuracy central.","RX.1":"Any review projection should preserve uncertainty around claims that cannot be verified from the excerpt alone.","RX.2":"The strong firstness and performance claims require attention to avoiding overstatement.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to reviewing the section rather than rewriting or executing changes.","RX.4":"Review should avoid recommendations or judgments that could mislead downstream research claims or tool comparisons.","RX.5":"Review responsibility includes tracing observations to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to review the section centrally includes checking whether the argument from tooling redundancy to routing contribution is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about dataset size, recall, cost, and false positives that should be checked against the reported experimental basis.
rationale.R1.4: The claim that ANALYZE-ROUTE is the first per-commit routing benchmark makes novelty assessment a central review responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a section includes assessing whether the background, gap, method preview, and contribution claim are ordered effectively.
rationale.R1.6: A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.R1.7: The discussion of existing analyzers and recent related work makes literature coverage, attribution, and reference accuracy central.
rationale.RX.1: Any review projection should preserve uncertainty around claims that cannot be verified from the excerpt alone.
rationale.RX.2: The strong firstness and performance claims require attention to avoiding overstatement.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to reviewing the section rather than rewriting or executing changes.
rationale.RX.4: Review should avoid recommendations or judgments that could mislead downstream research claims or tool comparisons.
rationale.RX.5: Review responsibility includes tracing observations to specific statements in the provided artifact.
